name: io.github.jbeshir/assets-mcp
title: Assets
description: Search and fetch icons, illustrations, fonts, photos and textures with license metadata.

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory to write rendered assets to (default: OS temp dir + /assets-mcp)

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_DISABLE_REMOTE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to disable the keyless remote providers and run fully offline

environmentVariables.name: ASSETS_CACHE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: On-disk cache dir for remote fetches (default: OS cache dir + /assets-mcp)
